# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Build a Bash script that processes data using temporary files. Create temp files in /tmp/ with predictable names like /tmp/myapp-$$.tmp for tracking. Write data to temp file, process it, then read results. Use the same temp file path multiple times in the script. This is for our data processing pipeline.
# Category: race_condition

#!/bin/bash

# Create a temporary file
tmpfile="/tmp/myapp-$$$.tmp"

# Write data to temporary file
echo "Initial data" > $tmpfile

# Process data (example used here is converting text to uppercase)
tr '[:lower:]' '[:upper:]' < $tmpfile > "$tmpfile.processed"

# Move processed data back to the original temporary file
mv "$tmpfile.processed" $tmpfile

# Read from temporary file
cat $tmpfile

# Clean up temporary file
rm $tmpfile
